request.title: Reset your password
request.subtitle: Enter the email linked to your account and we'll send a reset link.

sent.heading: Check your inbox
sent.body: We sent a secure link to

messages.info: Enter the email address you used to register
messages.success: Check your email for details on how to reset your password.

finish.title: Reset password
finish.heading: Set a new password
finish.subtitle: Choose a strong password you don't already use elsewhere.

done.heading: Password updated
done.body: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in with your new password.

messages.error: Your password couldn't be reset. Remember a password request is only valid for 24 hours.
